query: SELECT teacherNameId, votingPeriodId, COUNT(*) as vote_count FROM teacher_votes GROUP BY teacherNameId, votingPeriodId HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY vote_count DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35xPkBa73Yuiy4A.root --database kcQuJzmxhkjxjyE5pHTEwG --execute SELECT teacherNameId, votingPeriodId, COUNT(*) as vote_count FROM teacher_votes GROUP BY teacherNameId, votingPeriodId HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY vote_count DESC LIMIT 10;
